title: carduus tenuiflorus subsp. tenuiflorus
intro: Carduus tenuiflorus subsp. tenuiflorus, also known as the slender-flowered thistle or mountain thistle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the thistle family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Carduus tenuiflorus subsp. tenuiflorus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat digestive issues, as well as its potential to help with cancer prevention and treatment. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
